I changed the BB Image to alpine for consistency. Mixing should not really matter.  As for changing Fedora to fedora-minimal, that is done because the minimal image is significantly smaller and is not cached ... therefore minimal is faster and sufficient for the tests.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 3aa63b2) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
I'm going to merge this to get the show on the road.
